name: multi-file-tools
description: Compare, summarize, and manage multiple files at once

actions.title: Compare Files
actions.description: Compare the selected files and highlight differences

actions.title: Summarize All
actions.description: Generate a summary for each selected file

actions.title: Find Duplicates
actions.description: Detect duplicate or near-duplicate content across the selected files or folder

actions.title: Suggest Filenames
actions.description: Suggest better filenames for each selected file based on their content
